productDisplayName: American Tourister Men Brown Leather Wallet
description: Brown textured two fold leather wallet with stitched detail and overlays, has branding on the frontOne main compartment with a separator sleeveThe left fold has an ID card holder and a flap with two ID card holders and three card holdersThe right fold has a slip pocket and a coin pocket with a flap across the mouth secured with a press-button closureWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
